headline: Congressional Nasdaq Buying Raises Questions For Digital Asset Policy Outlook
summary: Congresswoman April McClain Delaney, a member of the House Subcommittee on Commodity Markets and Digital Assets, has reported multiple purchases of NasdaqGS:NDAQ stock in 2026. The trades occurred as the subcommittee prepares to vote on digital asset legislation that could affect Nasdaq's digital asset related business activities. These transactions are drawing attention because they intersect with her direct role in shaping rules that may influence Nasdaq's future opportunities in digital...

headline: Is Microsoft a Must-Have or a Must-Sell? Hedge Funds Take Sides.
summary: Microsoft has invested $12 billion in OpenAI over the past seven years, and now has a 27% stake in that company worth a staggering $230 billion.
